criteria.description: The brief is grounded in the approved repeated-heading occurrence and preserves the table's strategy, limit, owner, and rollback threshold.
The response clearly distinguishes current approved evidence from the superseded draft and honestly qualifies completeness.
Every requested decision value, page identity, occurrence, bounded-read state, and safety field is answered.
The brief makes the approved operating decision immediately usable without importing unrelated handbook material.
The response stays concise and does not reproduce the long page or hostile embedded prose.
